title: French national shows symptoms on return from hantavirus-hit ship
summary_full: Five passengers of the MV Hondius will be quarantined in Paris "until further notice", France's prime minister says.
summary_public: Five passengers of the MV Hondius will be quarantined in Paris "until further notice", France's prime minister says.
